description: Final posted outcome plus the System-of-Record reference and downstream notify targets. The terminal record the orchestrator posts back to the claims system of record (for example Guidewire).

exposureId.description: Optional exposure discriminator. One accident can have multiple exposures (e.g. own-vehicle collision + third-party property + bodily injury); set the same exposureId across the coverage/damage/authority/settlement records of one exposure so N exposures coexist under one claimNumber.

subrogationPotential.description: Optional. true flags this outcome for downstream subrogation (recovery from the at-fault third party). The recovery workflow itself is out of scope for this recipe; this only marks the hand-off on-chain.

adverseActionNoticeRef.description: Optional. Reference to the jurisdiction-specific adverse-action / denial notice artifact sent to the insured. State-specific notice content + timelines are deployment config; this links the notice on-chain.
